results.title: Sanctum Dashboard

results.snippet:
DashFlow is a Chrome extension that reads your current page and generates a beautiful, structured AI-powered visual dashboard or summary — without leaving your browser.
...
Just open DashFlow, pick a use case, and your AI output is ready in seconds — as a clean visual you can read and act on immediately.
...
Get a structured visual dashboard — perfect for understanding project status, data, and key metrics at a glance.
...
Get a clean, concise AI summary of any page — perfect for research, reports, and quick reviews.
...
🚀 GETTING STARTED
1. Install DashFlow from the Chrome Web Store.
2. Open any page in Chrome.
3. Add your API Labz Token.
4. Pick Dashboard or Summarize — or write custom instructions.
5. Click "Generate AI Dashboard".
Your visual is ready in seconds.
...

results.title: Dashflow - Chrome Web Store

results.snippet:
Our AI summary tile is a powerful dashboard feature that creates a concise summary of all the content within a dashboard tab – giving you and your stakeholders a clear, instant snapshot of key insights.
With the AI summary tile, you can:
On any Crunch dashboard, find a tab and click Edit.
Click the + menu and select ‘AI tab summary’.
A new dashboard tile will be created at the top of your dashboard.
Click the “Generate summary” button to generate an AI summary of the dashboard tab.
Stakeholders will be able to see the AI summary at the top of your dashboard.
results.title: The era of AI-powered dashboard intelligence has arrived - Crunch.io

message.content:
The Chaotic Sanctum dashboard reports a Total Value Locked (TVL) of 878.33M and daily trading volume of 31.68K. Usage metrics show 2.44M SOL dispensed over time and 433.91K unstakes over time. For Infinity LST, the dashboard lists 2,157 daily $INF holders, along with 10 daily deposits by LST and 2 daily withdrawals by LST. The provided sources do not include any broader health assessment, trend interpretation, or uptime/status indicators beyond these metrics.  

Sources used:
1. Sanctum Dashboard (https://sanctum-dashboard.vercel.app)

Our AI summary tile is a powerful dashboard feature that creates a concise summary of all the content within a dashboard tab – giving you and your stakeholders a clear, instant snapshot of key insights.
With the AI summary tile, you can:
On any Crunch dashboard, find a tab and click Edit.
Click the + menu and select ‘AI tab summary’.
A new dashboard tile will be created at the top of your dashboard.
Click the “Generate summary” button to generate an AI summary of the dashboard tab.
Stakeholders will be able to see the AI summary at the top of your dashboard.
